title: selliguea simplicissima
intro: Selliguea simplicissima, also known as the Chinese polypody or silver fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern that has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
